suggestions.title: Stale retry constant can drift from actual retry behavior
suggestions.action: Removed unused TRAPI_RETRYABLE_STATUS_CODES so classification logic is the single source of retry policy.

suggestions.title: Test coverage does not explicitly assert non-500/503 5xx retry behavior
suggestions.action: Added test_fetch_roster_retries_for_non_503_server_errors to verify 502 responses are retried with warning logs and backoff.
